heading: Everything you need to manage your team
subheading: Powerful features designed to simplify your HR workflows and improve employee experience.

employees.title: Employee Management
employees.description: Centralize all employee data, from personal information to performance records in one secure location.

leave.title: Leave Management
leave.description: Streamline leave requests, approvals, and tracking with automated workflows and real-time updates.

documents.title: Document Storage
documents.description: Store and organize all HR documents securely with easy access and version control.

analytics.title: Analytics & Reports
analytics.description: Get insights into workforce trends, attendance patterns, and performance metrics.

compliance.title: Security & Compliance
compliance.description: Enterprise-grade security with role-based access control and compliance management.

automation.title: Automated Workflows
automation.description: Automate repetitive HR tasks and focus on strategic initiatives that matter.
